channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Can AI Read Your Pet's Mind? New Device Sparks Buzz

media:content.media:description: The startup says the system is trained on millions of pet sound samples

item.description: The startup says the system is trained on millions of pet sound samples and can recognise emotions.
item.content:encoded: The startup says the system is trained on millions of pet sound samples and can recognise emotions.

item.title: 24 Killed As Car With Explosives Rams Train Carrying Pak Soldiers In Balochistan

media:content.media:description: Many army soldiers were among the victims.

item.description: 24 Killed In Blast Near Railway Track In Pakistan, Baloch Group Claims Attack
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1103660/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>24 Killed In Blast Near Railway Track In Pakistan, Baloch Group Claims Attack

item.title: White House Shooter Claimed To Be 'Real Osama Bin Laden', Threatened Trump: Report

media:content.media:description: The suspect, identified as 21-year-old Nasire Best, had made a threat to Trump on social media.

item.description: In June last year, Maryland native Best had blocked an entry lane at the White House.
item.content:encoded: In June last year, Maryland native Best had blocked an entry lane at the White House.

item.title: "Although I'm From Miami...": Marco Rubio On Delhi's Sweltering Heat

media:content.media:description: A yellow alert for heatwave has been issued in Delhi.

item.description: Marco Rubio arrived in New Delhi as part of his four-day India tour and was seen reacting to the sweltering heat.
item.content:encoded: Marco Rubio arrived in New Delhi as part of his four-day India tour and was seen reacting to the sweltering heat.

item.title: US Iran War Live Updates: Peace Deal To Be Announced "Shortly", Says Trump
item.description: US Iran War Live Updates: Iran's top negotiator Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf said Iran's armed forces had rebuilt their capabilities during the ceasefire.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War Live Updates: Iran's top negotiator Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf said Iran's armed forces had rebuilt their capabilities during the ceasefire.

item.title: "US, India Not Just Allies, We're Strategic Allies": Rubio To S Jaishankar
item.description: Marco Rubio, who began his four-day India visit yesterday, met his Indian counterpart S Jaishankar this morning.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1103572/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Marco Rubio, who began his four-day India visit yesterday, met his Indian counterpart S Jaishankar this morning.

item.title: "Good News In Few Hours": Top US Diplomat's Big Iran Update From India

media:content.media:description: Marco Rubio said the emerging peace deal would address concerns on the Strait of Hormuz.

item.description: Marco Rubio Press Conference With S Jaishankar On Iran War: "Possibility That World Will Get Some Good News In Next Few Hours"
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1103623/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Marco Rubio Press Conference With S Jaishankar On Iran War: "Possibility That World Will Get Some Good News In Next Few Hours"

item.title: "Chutzpah": Critics Target George Soros After $30M Anti-Hate Pledge

media:content.media:description: US President Donald Trump had also targeted George Soros last September.

item.description: Critics have accused George Soros of backing groups that helped fuel anti-Israel protests across US college campuses.
item.content:encoded: Critics have accused George Soros of backing groups that helped fuel anti-Israel protests across US college campuses.

item.title: Man Dies After Shark Attack On Australia's Great Barrier Reef

media:content.media:description: There are around 20 shark attacks in Australia every year.

item.description: A 39yearold man has died after being attacked by a shark at the Great Barrier Reef on Sunday, police said, the second fatal shark attack in Australia this month. The
item.content:encoded: A 39yearold man has died after being attacked by a shark at the Great Barrier Reef on Sunday, police said, the second fatal shark attack in Australia this month. The

item.title: California Chemical Tank At Risk Of Exploding, 40,000 Residents To Evacuate

media:content.media:description: Firefighters' first hope is to find a way to cool off the chemical inside the tank.

item.description: The weather will be an important factor in determining where a plume of chemicals would go in the event of an explosion.
item.content:encoded: The weather will be an important factor in determining where a plume of chemicals would go in the event of an explosion.

item.title: Ro Khanna Jabs Trump For Skipping Son's Wedding After His "Dumocrat" Post

media:content.media:description: Ro Khanna responded with a sharp jab aimed at Trump's decision to skip son's wedding.

item.description: Trump had earlier said he might not attend the wedding due to tensions involving Iran and ongoing presidential responsibilities.
item.content:encoded: Trump had earlier said he might not attend the wedding due to tensions involving Iran and ongoing presidential responsibilities.

item.title: Under-construction Building In Philippines Collapses, 21 Missing

media:content.media:description: Rescuers including firefighters, police and disaster-response teams used their hands and sniffer dogs.

item.description: Rescuers were "hearing voices" in the rubble, while 24 workers managed to dash to safety or were rescued.
item.content:encoded: Rescuers were "hearing voices" in the rubble, while 24 workers managed to dash to safety or were rescued.

item.title: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: "India Among Few Nations Able To Influence Global Issues": Marco Rubio

media:content.media:description: Marco Rubio India visit: This is Marco Rubio's first trip to India since taking office

item.description: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: The top US diplomat is scheduled to hold talks with External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar and attend a meeting of the Quad foreign ministers.
item.content:encoded: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: The top US diplomat is scheduled to hold talks with External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar and attend a meeting of the Quad foreign ministers.

item.title: New Deal, Old Fineprint: Iran Oil Sale, Hormuz Part Of Likely 60-Day US Truce

media:content.media:description: Per the deal, Iran will clear mines in the Strait of Hormuz to allow the free passage of ships.

item.description: Iranian officials have stressed that gaps between the sides persist and the dispute over the nuclear program would not be part of initial negotiations.
item.content:encoded: Iranian officials have stressed that gaps between the sides persist and the dispute over the nuclear program would not be part of initial negotiations.

item.title: 26-Year-Old Indian Arrested By US Immigration Officials Over Theft, Vandalism

media:content.media:description: Singh has a prior criminal record that includes vehicle theft, grand theft, trespassing

item.description: In a post on X, the agency said, "ICE Los Angeles arrested Parminderpal Singh, 26, of India, on May 21. He is in ICE custody pending removal."
item.content:encoded: In a post on X, the agency said, "ICE Los Angeles arrested Parminderpal Singh, 26, of India, on May 21. He is in ICE custody pending removal."

item.title: Buildings Shake, People Rush To Shelters As Ballistic Missile Pounds Kyiv

media:content.media:description: Ukrainian authorities and the US embassy had earlier warned of a possible significant attack.

item.description: A large ballistic missile attack pounded Kyiv early on Sunday, authorities said, wounding at least five people after Moscow threatened retaliation for...
item.content:encoded: A large ballistic missile attack pounded Kyiv early on Sunday, authorities said, wounding at least five people after Moscow threatened retaliation for...

item.title: Highlights: Trump Says Gunman Had "Violent History", Possible 'Obsession' With White House
item.description: White House Shooting live updates: Both individuals were said to be in critical condition, according to the official, who spoke on the condition of anonymity because they were not authorised to discuss the investigation.
item.content:encoded: White House Shooting live updates: Both individuals were said to be in critical condition, according to the official, who spoke on the condition of anonymity because they were not authorised to discuss the investigation.

item.title: 18 Suspected Ebola Patients Missing After Treatment Tent Set On Fire In Congo

media:content.media:description: The bodies of those who died of Ebola can be highly contagious and lead to further spread.

item.description: Another treatment center was burned down after family members were banned from retrieving the body of a local man suspected to have died of Ebola.
item.content:encoded: Another treatment center was burned down after family members were banned from retrieving the body of a local man suspected to have died of Ebola.

item.title: US Conducts Military Drill Over Venezuelan Capital Caracas

media:content.media:description: The drill included two MV-22B Osprey aircraft.

item.description: The U.S. military conducted a drill over the Venezuelan capital Caracas on Saturday, its first military exercise in the South American nation since U.S. troops attacked the
item.content:encoded: The U.S. military conducted a drill over the Venezuelan capital Caracas on Saturday, its first military exercise in the South American nation since U.S. troops attacked the

item.title: Waiting For Peace Deal, Britain Preps For A Mission To Clear Hormuz

media:content.media:description: With a crew of several hundred sailors, the RFA Lyme Bay will soon depart Gibraltar.

item.description: Britain's Armed Forces Minister Al Carns took a small group of reporters to visit the RFA Lyme Bay as it prepares for a possible international operation, led by the UK and France, to secure the strait.
item.content:encoded: Britain's Armed Forces Minister Al Carns took a small group of reporters to visit the RFA Lyme Bay as it prepares for a possible international operation, led by the UK and France, to secure the strait.
